signInSubtitle: Use your email, username, or Employee ID
errorRequired: Please enter your login and password.
errorFailed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
errorNoAccount: No account found with that username or Employee ID.
sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
accessRevoked: Your access has been revoked. Contact your administrator.
mfaSubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
awaitingApprovalBody: Your account is pending approval. An administrator will review and activate your account shortly.
awaitingApprovalContact: Please contact your administrator if this takes longer than expected.
accessNoPermission: Your role does not have permission to access this module.
contactAdmin: Contact your administrator to request access.
